results.title: Eurodollar / Funding Stress — Decisive Call
results.one_liner: Dollar abundant liquidity masks structural tightness; equity vol benign but funding stress data gaps create blind spot.

results.title: Dollar (DXY) — Decisive Call
results.one_liner: Dollar in modest dump regime; liquidity flood + real-yield uptick clash; risk-on bias intact but fragile.

results.title: VIX Curve — Decisive Call
results.one_liner: Steep contango + low VIX mask elevated cross-asset stress; vol-sell carry dominates but tail risk priced cheap.

results.title: Yield Curve — Decisive Call
results.one_liner: Curve flattening from historic lows signals recession risk, but cross-asset calm contradicts—data gap prevents conviction.

results.title: Liquidity & Credit — Decisive Call
results.one_liner: Credit complacency at extremes; liquidity flush masks duration risk; equity upside capped until spreads widen.

results.title: Systemic Stress — Decisive Call
results.one_liner: Euro-area systemic stress dormant (6th pctile); UK/France fragmentation rising; dollar strength + real yields at crisis-era levels signal structural tightness.
